tasks.label: Release Candidate Cycle
tasks.purpose: Run the governed release-candidate conveyor and publish the latest candidate evidence bundle.
tasks.completionSignal: Latest release-candidate bundle contains a build-evidence manifest.
escalatesWhen: release-candidate run cannot emit a valid evidence bundle

tasks.label: Daily HITL Digest
tasks.purpose: Emit the daily review surface that tells us whether the build can continue unattended or now owes human review.
tasks.completionSignal: Latest digest bundle contains release-candidate-digest.json and release-candidate-digest.md.

tasks.label: Promotion Watch
tasks.authority: Automation may classify; HITL decides promotion
tasks.purpose: Track whether the current automation posture is clear to continue, requires HITL, or is blocked.
tasks.completionSignal: Current posture is reflected in local-automation-tasking-status.json.

tasks.label: Scheduler Watch
tasks.trigger: scheduled task registration and next-run clock
tasks.purpose: Track whether the local Windows scheduler is registered, ready, and aligned to the next release-candidate cadence.
tasks.completionSignal: Scheduled task is registered and exposes a next run time.
outputs: Windows Scheduled Task: OAN Mortalis Governed Automation Cycle
escalatesWhen: scheduled task has no next run time
